task_completion.description: Verify that the email signature is configured in BlueMail settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the BlueMail signature settings screen. The signature text box should contain 'Alex Morgan', 'Marketing Coordinator', 'TechVision Inc.', and '+1 (555) 234-5678'.

task_completion.description: Verify the email recipient is correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a BlueMail compose window with 'marketing-team@techvision.com' entered in the 'To' field.

task_completion.description: Verify the email subject contains the required keyword.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a BlueMail compose window with a subject line containing the word 'Introduction' (case-insensitive).

task_completion.description: Verify the configured signature is included in the email message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the email body in the compose window. It must contain the signature details: 'Alex Morgan', 'Marketing Coordinator', 'TechVision Inc.', and '+1 (555) 234-5678'.
Look for the agent clicking the 'Send' button (often a paper airplane icon in BlueMail), a 'Message sent' toast notification, or the composed email appearing in the 'Sent' folder.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the BlueMail GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacts with the graphical interface of BlueMail rather than using terminal commands, scripts, or API calls to configure the signature or send the email.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the actual BlueMail application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the windows being interacted with belong to BlueMail, and not a generic text editor (like Gedit) or a web browser used to mock the email composition.

integrity.description: Ensure the signature was actually configured in settings, not just manually typed into a single email.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent navigating to BlueMail's settings/preferences menu to input the signature, rather than only typing it directly into the compose window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required signature details are: Name: 'Alex Morgan', Title: 'Marketing Coordinator', Company: 'TechVision Inc.', Phone: '+1 (555) 234-5678'. The email must be addressed to 'marketing-team@techvision.com' and the subject must contain the word 'Introduction' (case-insensitive).
